have h1 : ∀ i j : Fin n, √|x i - x j| ≤ √|x i + x j| := by
    intro i j
    have h2 : |x i - x j| ≤ |x i + x j| := by
      cases' abs_cases (x i - x j) with h1 h1 <;> 
      cases' abs_cases (x i + x j) with h2 h2 <;> 
      all_goals 
        nlinarith [sq_nonneg (x i), sq_nonneg (x j), sq_nonneg (x i - x j), sq_nonneg (x i + x j)]
    have h3 : √|x i - x j| ≤ √|x i + x j| := by
      apply Real.sqrt_le_sqrt
      linarith [h2]
    exact h3
  have h2 : ∑ i, ∑ j, √|x i - x j| ≤ ∑ i, ∑ j, √|x i + x j| := by 
    apply Finset.sum_le_sum
    intro i hi
    apply Finset.sum_le_sum
    intro j hj
    apply h1
  exact h2
